name: Grigory 15" Wall Sconce (Set of 2) - SCN4079 - Natural/Black - Safavieh
description: Elevate your home ambiance with the Grigory 15 inch wall sconce set. This stunning duo features a beautiful blend of natural rattan and black iron, adding a touch of sophistication to any space. Designed to complement both modern and classic interiors, the Grigory wall sconces cast a warm and inviting glow, creating the perfect atmosphere for relaxation or entertainment. Each sconce embodies a seamless blend of metal and rattan, highlighting an exquisite contrast that enhances any decor style. Easy to install and versatile in design, this sconce set provides an effortless way to upgrade your living space. Transform your environment with the elegant simplicity and chic appeal of the Grigory wall sconce set. Add a touch of charm with this exquisite lighting solution today.
